title: ResultSetMetaData
description: Metadata about the result set including column definitions.

format.description: For v2 endpoints the only possible value for this field is jsonv2.

numRows.description: The total number of rows of results.

rowType.description: Array of column descriptors for the result set.

partitionInfo.description: Information about result set partitions for large results.

nullable.description: If false, null values are replaced with the string 'null' in the result set.
